title: loroglossum hircinum var. caprinum
intro: Loroglossum hircinum var. caprinum, also known as the goat's beard or beard lily, is a type of orchid species. This plant is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Loroglossum hircinum var. caprinum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, and to soothe skin irritations. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the roots and using them in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
